data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MOTOR CITY TRUMP comes off an average effort last start when eighth at Wentworth Park over 520m behind Zipping Lowens (31.36) in a Grade 5. Placed at his previous run. Reliable out of the boxes and should take advantage of the inside draw. Can atone. 8. GO FORWARD MEG has been in the frame at her last two runs, most recently when second (23.16) in a Grade 5 over 401m at this track. Safe beginner but wide box to overcome and will need some luck. Can feature with the right run. 3. MISTER ANATOLY was strongly fancied latest and proved too good with a 1.75 lengths win at this track in a handy 23.02. Fair draw can see a good run and has the ability and in winning form. Smart beginner who should take advantage of the low draw. Expecting another bold showing. 6. DASHING FOR GOLD profiles nicely over this trip.","runners":[1,8,3,6],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: RICHMOND-R6-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
